results.rendered_html:
ghoṣaṇaṃ, -ṇā [ghuṣ bhāve lyuṭ]
1 Proclamation, declaring or speaking aloud, public announcement; vyāghāto jayaghoṣaṇādiṣu balādasmadbalānāṃ kṛtaḥ  Mu. 3. 26 ;  R. 12. 72. 
2 Speaking aloud, making a great noise.
